title: chlidanthus luteus
intro: Chlidanthus luteus, also known as the Yellow Flag, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Chlidanthus luteus typically involve drying and infusing the flowers and leaves in water or oil to create teas, infusions, and topical ointments.
